name: Joshua Wetzel
title: Full-stack Developer
summary: Full-stack developer with 6+ years across .NET Core, Node, React, Next.js, Angular, and SQL/MongoDB. Works on legacy-system modernization, AI-assisted ops tooling, and solo-shipped products. Experienced working remote.

bullets: Sole developer on the Fastlane compliance platform — full ownership across API, web, data model, and deployment.
Designed and shipped features end-to-end: schema changes, backend logic, UI, and customer rollout.
Kept a production system healthy for 4+ years as the only engineer on the codebase.
Modernized a large VB/Classic ASP surface onto .NET Core + React, incrementally, without taking the system offline.
Built AWS infrastructure for the new services and owned the deployment pipeline.
Handled data migrations from legacy schemas into the new application domain.
Prototyped NLP experiences across IBM Watson, Microsoft LUIS, and Amazon Alexa.
Built demo voice apps as proofs of concept for client engagements.

projects.name: CookJunkie
